chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1071 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.5070/2020 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 02-02-2021 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Channa, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Mian Imtiaz Ali Qureshi, Advocate for respondent No.4. Mr. Ali Raza Pathan, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for respondent No.4 has brought an original cheque bearing No.B097765 dated 01-02-2021 amounting to Rs.1,497,572.00 (Rupees one million four hundred ninety seven thousand five hundred seventy two only) in the name of Petitioner Manzoor Ahmed son of Allah Rakhio. The above cheque (in original) has been handed over to the Accountant of this Court, who is present in Court, with direction to transmit the same to the petitioner after proper identification, verification and obtaining receipt. Learned counsel for respondent No.4 places on record photostat copies of letter regarding compliance report and affidavit of the petitioner, which are taken on record, and submits that the remaining amount of Rs.493,920.00 (Rupees four hundred ninety three thousand nine hundred twenty only) will be paid to the petitioner within a week. In view of above, the petition has served its purpose, and the same is accordingly disposed of with further direction to the respondents to pay the remaining amount of Rs.493,920.00 (Rupees four hundred ninety three thousand nine hundred twenty only) to the petitioner within a week under compliance report through Additional Registrar of this Court.

Learned counsel for respondent No.4 places on record photostat copies of letter regarding compliance report and affidavit of the petitioner, which are taken on record, and submits that the remaining amount of Rs.493,920.00 (Rupees four hundred ninety three thousand nine hundred twenty only) will be paid to the petitioner within a week. In view of above, the petition has served its purpose, and the same is accordingly disposed of with further direction to the respondents to pay the remaining amount of Rs.493,920.00 (Rupees four hundred ninety three thousand nine hundred twenty only) to the petitioner within a week under compliance report through Additional Registrar of this Court. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
